name_en: (With full packaging)!!️【New Arrival】G brand logo symbols are reinterpreted in different ways every season. The new double G pattern design is bold and eye-catching. This bag features a handle design and can be worn crossbody. Revitalizing classic materials with a modern touch, paired with imported cowhide and matching hardware with clear grain and fine texture.
